channel.title: Stateful Management on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in Stateful Management on Jeremy Pellerino | Portfolio

item.title: Sudoku
item.description:
This implementation of sudoku is a cross-platform game written in Flutter where a 9x9 grid is filled in with the numbers 1-9, and conflicts must be avoided.

Being my first Flutter project and first cross-platform game, I wrote this to learn a lot about different development platforms, a new language, and new programming skills.

item.title: Tic-Tac-Toe
item.description: This is yet another rendition of the tic-tac-toe game. My first application written with ReactJS, it establishes the use of ReactJS basics like React.createElement and ReactDOM.createRoot to build the site. The AI is based on the minimax algorithm.
